title: Candidate Item — llmwiki adapted from harness-core chunk_extract.candidate_items[]
description: One extracted candidate item. Generalized from the Catholic/academic harness-core schema: the biblical_text type is renamed to religious_text and the language is domain-neutral throughout.

local_candidate_id.description: Stable SHA-256-prefix-derived id (16 hex chars). Same source_id+type+span -> same id.

type.description: Generalized from harness-core common.schema.json#candidate_type. biblical_text -> religious_text.

source_id.description: SHA-256 hex prefix (16 chars) of the source content.

page.description: 1-based page number for PDF inputs; absent for plaintext/markdown.

evidence_text.description: Verbatim text fragment from the source supporting this candidate.
